title: cracca senna
intro: Cracca senna, also known as Cassia senna or Senna alexandrina, is a plant that belongs to the legume family and is commonly used as a laxative. The medicinal properties of cracca senna are attributed to its high concentration of anthraquinone glycosides, which stimulate bowel movements and relieve constipation. The health benefits of cracca senna include promoting regular bowel movements, reducing inflammation, and improving digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for digestive issues. Cracca senna is often prepared as a tea or capsule by drying and grinding the leaves and pods of the plant, and its effects can be enhanced when combined with other herbs like ginger and peppermint.
